text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...I had a scary dream. Someone was pretending
to be me.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: But then everyone thought I was the fake!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Even though I'm definitely cuter than that phony!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... You'd be able to tell the difference, right?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... You'd be able to tell the difference, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Curren Chan's nightmare prevented her
from getting a good night's sleep.
